articles.title: E25 only being tested, no rollout decision yet: Puri
articles.description: India News: NEW DELHI: Petroleum minister Hardeep Singh Puri on Thursday said E25 (petrol with 25% ethanol) is \"only being tested\" and no decision has been taken .

articles.title: Brawl at petrol pump over moving vehicle spills onto Sohna highway, FIR registered
